member.name: M:Canon.Introspect.ISchemaProvider.Harvest
member.summary: Harvests the schema from the live database.

member.name: T:Canon.Introspect.ISchemaProvider
member.summary: Abstraction for database drivers to provide their schema and constraints. SqlHydra will implement this for Postgres/DuckDB/SQLite.

member.name: T:Canon.Introspect.TableDef
member.summary: Represents a table in the database schema.

member.name: T:Canon.Introspect.ColumnDef
member.summary: Represents a column in the database schema.

member.name: T:Canon.Introspect.SemanticMetadata
member.summary: Represents semantic metadata attached to a field (from Helios concepts)

member.name: T:Canon.Introspect.Postgres.ConstraintParser
member.summary: Parses raw SQL constraint strings into our Lattice algebra.
